name: RODY LAMOREE ; SWAP PLATE
description:
You share some history with Manon, and now since she stopped picking up Rody’s calls you’re his main suspect of stealing her away from him.

What he doesn’t know is that you may or may not be responsible for her death (he thinks she still is alive).

keywords; dp, deadplate, swapplate, dead plate, swap plate, Rody Lamoree, Manon, Restaurant
creator: LuShuan
